subject: [PATCH v7 05/15] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new VMA flag called VM_UFFD_RWP to extend userfaultfd protection from plain write-protection (WP) to full read-write protection. The flag is gated on the CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP configuration option, which will be introduced in a later patch. The patch also adds helper functions and updates documentation to reflect the new flag. Currently, no code sets or queries the flag yet.
